info.title: AbaPay
info.description: AbaPay is a Web3 utility bill payment agent for Nigeria — airtime, data, electricity, cable TV, and more — settled on-chain. This endpoint accepts x402 payments in USDC on Celo to pay a bill on behalf of the caller.

post.summary: Pay a Nigerian utility bill (airtime, data, electricity, cable) via x402
post.description: Settles a real-world bill payment via the x402 protocol. The caller pays in USDC on Celo; on confirmed settlement, AbaPay vends the underlying service (airtime top-up, data bundle, electricity token, cable subscription) through its provider integration and returns the result. Price is dynamic — it equals the live NGN value of the bill being paid, converted to USDC at the platform's current exchange rate, so there is no fixed catalog price for this resource.

serviceCategory.description: AIRTIME | DATA | ELECTRICITY | CABLE | BANK | EDUCATION

network.description: Provider name, e.g. MTN, IKEJA-ELECTRIC, DSTV

billersCode.description: Phone number, meter number, or smartcard/IUC number being paid for

nairaAmount.description: Bill amount in Nigerian Naira — the source of truth for pricing this request

token.description: Only USDC is supported for x402 settlement at this time

blockchain.description: Only Celo is supported for x402 settlement at this time

wallet_address.description: The paying wallet's address, for cross-checking against the x402 payment authorization's payer

200.description: Bill vended successfully (or queued for background processing).

purchased_code.description: Electricity token or exam PIN, when applicable

402.description: Payment required — standard x402 challenge response.
